article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with prominent figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
He has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across various productions.
His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, reflecting a distinct approach within the electronic music landscape.
Noizekid's work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
